summary.headline: Site live on buildt.ie, first managed cycle underway.
summary.note: BUILDT launched at the end of June on Cloudflare. The one-time build is complete and paid in full. The managed plan begins billing on 1 August; a baseline security audit is scheduled for the week before. Full record below.

delivery.title: Deployed to Cloudflare Pages
delivery.detail: Site went live on buildt.ie, on Cloudflare Pages, with an automated deploy on every change.

delivery.title: Coming-soon page and launch list
delivery.detail: Pre-launch holding page with an email launch-list signup, so interest is captured before opening.

delivery.title: Launch list stored in your database
delivery.detail: Signups persist to a Cloudflare D1 waitlist table, the same list shown in this portal.

delivery.title: Admin panel
delivery.detail: Password-gated admin, including an editor for the configurator's expected-performance figures.

delivery.title: Monitoring and pre-launch access
delivery.detail: Error monitoring, a health probe, and a preview flag so the full site could be reviewed before going public.

delivery.title: Workshop location map
delivery.detail: A live map pinned to the workshop Eircode on Contact and the homepage, tinted to sit in the dark UI.

delivery.title: PC configurator
delivery.detail: Build flow around a Value default with live price deltas, RGB and Gen5 upgrade toggles, and a consult option.

delivery.title: Configurator case previews
delivery.detail: Twelve case and lighting renders, four cases across three lightings, so the look updates as you build.

delivery.title: Homepage and build flow
delivery.detail: Homepage with the build-your-own entry point, a recently-sold marquee, and gaming-first copy.

delivery.title: Core pages built
delivery.detail: Builds, Stock, Services, About, Contact, and FAQ pages, in your voice and content.

delivery.title: Brand identity applied
delivery.detail: Your emblem and wordmark set site-wide, with a matching gradient favicon and card styling.

delivery.title: Project kickoff
delivery.detail: Custom Svelte build scaffolded and the site structure set.

incidents.title: Pre-launch gate briefly open
incidents.impact: buildt.ie was publicly reachable instead of the holding page. The admin stayed protected.
incidents.detail: A deploy reset the production configuration and dropped the coming-soon flag. Restored the same session. The waitlist and all data were unaffected.

notes: Baseline security audit is scheduled for the week before the managed plan begins on 1 August. Findings will be reported here once it has run.

nextUp.title: Mobile layout pass: resolve horizontal scroll
